overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character moves from a covered commercial walkway through open streets and under elevated highways, passing various pedestrians and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with large advertisement walls

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position near the advertisement wall

agents.ego_description: character starts walking away from the pink advertisement wall with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the advertisement wall looking at the posters

entered.detail: large wall with bright pink neon lighting and product advertisements including 'FOR FLAVOR! SET IT' text
illuminated billboards featuring product promotions and character images
pink neon-lit architectural frame surrounding the walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing before a brightly lit pink advertisement wall in a narrow covered walkway. As the character starts walking forward, they pass by illuminated posters and neon lighting, with a few pedestrians visible in the vicinity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with shops and vending machines

events.description: exits the narrow ad wall area into the covered shopping walkway with overhead roof

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade past various storefronts and vending machines

entered.detail: overhead roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway with industrial panels
illuminated automated vending machine with glowing product displays
storefronts with neon signage and glass windows displaying merchandise
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the adjacent street

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a covered commercial walkway protected by an overhead roof structure. The path is lined with illuminated vending machines and shop fronts on the left, while a metal railing separates the walkway from the street on the right. Neon signs provide the primary lighting in this sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with curved pedestrian path and city views

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with view of distant city skyline and skyscrapers
path curves to the right following the street railing along the elevated road

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk with the city street to the right, passing a seated individual

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a chair near the street railing facing the road

entered.detail: distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs against the night sky
wet asphalt street reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
large concrete pillar supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens up to reveal the expansive city skyline with towering skyscrapers in the distance. The character follows a curved path along a wet street, passing a person seated near the railing. The transition from enclosed to open space exposes the full neon-lit urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with dense commercial signage

events.description: enters the area beneath the massive elevated highway overpass with dense neon signage
passing illuminated food stalls and vendors under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway through a bustling commercial area with food vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the food stalls

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass deck with thick support pillars spanning overhead
large purple neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGU' text
illuminated food vendor stalls with glowing display cases and menus
neon arrow signs with Japanese text pointing in various directions

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass, where the environment becomes denser with commercial activity. Bright neon signs including a prominent 'TENGU' sign illuminate the area, while food stalls line the right side of the path. The overhead concrete structure blocks most of the sky, creating an urban canyon effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with food vendors and debris under overpass

events.description: walkway narrows into a grittier alley with dumpsters, trash, and graffiti-covered walls
passing through cluttered area with debris, graffiti, and overflowing dumpsters

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley past food stalls, debris, and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair and tattoos standing near a food stall

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpsters overflowing with trash and debris
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
hanging paper lanterns strung across the alley providing warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrower, grittier alleyway beneath the overpass. The path is lined with food vendors on the left and overflowing dumpsters on the right, while graffiti covers the walls. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, contrasting with the cold neon, as the character navigates through the cluttered urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit commercial corridor into the dense, gritty depths of a neon-soaked urban underpass. It begins before a glowing pink advertisement wall in a narrow walkway, moving past illuminated posters and pedestrians into a sheltered commercial path lined with vending machines and shop fronts. As the character emerges from the overhead roof, the scene opens up to reveal an expansive city skyline and towering skyscrapers across a wet, curved street. The camera then glides into the shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass, where the open sky is replaced by a concrete canopy and bright signs like the prominent Tengu advertisement. Finally, the environment shifts into a narrower, cluttered alleyway beneath the overpass, passing food vendors and graffiti-covered walls illuminated by contrasting red paper lanterns.
